title: potentilla × gelmiana
intro: Potentilla × gelmiana, also known as Cinquefoil, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Potentilla × gelmiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues.
